Cart AI

# Introduction to CartAI

CartAI is the AI agent that handles checkout.

One API to deploy a specialized agent that navigates any web property and completes the transaction — checkout, subscription sign-up, invoice payment, order submission, anywhere a transaction has to happen.

Automate it. Embed it, or enable it on surfaces that never had it. Composable. Reliable. Developer-first.

> Don't have an account yet? Sign up now →

## What CartAI Does [...] With CartAI, a user searching for "white linen shirt under $80" can complete the purchase directly in the search results page. A user scrolling a shoppable feed can tap "Buy Now" on a product card and get an order confirmation without ever visiting the retailer's site. CartAI handles the full checkout in the background — size selection, shipping, payment — and fires a webhook when the order is placed.

Example integration: A product search engine adds a "Buy with CartAI" button next to each result. The user selects size and colour, confirms their saved address, and the order is placed on the retailer's site within seconds. The platform earns an affiliate or referral fee on every completed transaction.

### 2. Vertical AI Apps — Fashion, Beauty, Home, Interior, Auto, Electronics [...] CartAI makes influencer content directly transactional. A product tagged in a post, a reel, or a livestream can be purchased by the audience without leaving the platform. CartAI handles the checkout in the background while the viewer keeps watching. The creator earns on completed transactions, not just clicks.

Example integration: A livestream shopping platform integrates CartAI so viewers can tap a featured product during the stream and purchase it without leaving the video. The influencer's product list is pre-loaded with URLs and variant data. CartAI places the order the moment the viewer confirms — the stream keeps playing.

### 6. Financial & Banking Apps

> Make shopping rewards spendable — right inside the app.

Browser Automation

Checkout is the hard part, and most solutions clear it only where the merchant has integrated. CartAI completes checkout on any live merchant surface with no merchant-side work, cooperating with bot detection instead of evading it. One developer-first API, four products: Catalog (search and live pricing across merchants), Checkouts (clear and track orders to confirmation), Payments (PCI off your stack via Visa and Mastercard agent rails), Monetization (commissions on every agent sale).

results.title: CartAI: The AI agent that handles checkout.
results.content:
What do you think? …

Manil Uppal
CartAI

CartAI

Hey PH 👋  
I'm Manil, founder of CartAI. We have been building CartAI for more than a year now and today we're shipping the developer release.  
The problem we kept running into: every AI agent demo ends right before the part that matters. Browser automation can navigate the web but can't pay. Payment APIs can move money but can't navigate. Your agent gets to the checkout button — and stops.

CartAI is the API that closes that gap. Integrate, point an agent at any web property, and it completes the transaction — checkouts, subscriptions, invoices, orders.

It's four products covering the full transaction lifecycle, with checkout as the wedge everything sits on: [...] Anusuya Bhuyan
Kunal Mestri
CartAI

CartAI

@anusuya\_bhuyan   
  
Exactly—you've identified the crux of it.

Enabling checkout without merchant-side integrations is only half the challenge. The other half is ensuring every transaction is secure, authentic, and trusted.

CartAI handles that complexity by working alongside the merchant's existing trust and security ecosystem—including solutions from our partners like Akamai, Cloudflare, Skyfire and HUMAN— so AI agents can complete purchases while respecting the same protection mechanisms merchants already rely on.

We believe that's what will make Agentic Commerce truly scalable. 🚀

Gal Dayan [...] → Catalog — find the product: search across merchants, live variants + pricing, and checkout estimates before a cart even exists  
→ Checkout — clear the order: complete on the live merchant surface, tracked to confirmation with normalized orders + webhooks  
→ Payments — move the money: hosted, PCI-compliant sessions on Visa Intelligent Commerce and Mastercard Agent Pay  
→ Monetization — share the upside: affiliate commission captured automatically across 70,000+ brands, attribution preserved through to the sale

Three ways to use it:  
→ Automate — your agent runs the full flow autonomously  
→ Embed — drop our agent into your app workflow  
→ Enable — add checkouts to surfaces that never had one. Make any surface commerce enabled.

results.title: AI Checkout and Agent Commerce: The Future of How We Shop
results.content:
In the coming years, AI agents may handle reorders, travel bookings, and subscription renewals, gradually earning the right to make larger decisions. Those who treat trust as their primary currency — not data — will shape the future of commerce, where conversation itself becomes the checkout line.
